name: California Country Meatballs and Peppers
recipeIngredient: Seeded and cut into thin strips
Seeded and cut into thin strips
Seeded and cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch skillet over medium heat, heat 1 tbsp olive oil. Add red, green, and yellow peppers and onion; cook about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until tender.
2. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, combine the ground meats (beef, pork, veal), egg, bread crumbs, parsley, fennel seeds, 1/4 tsp salt, and black pepper. Mix well with your hands or wooden spoon to create uniform mixture.
3. Shape the mixture into 1-1/4-inch balls using wet hands to prevent sticking.
4. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the vegetables from the skillet back to the bowl; keep warm.
5. To the skillet, add the remaining 2 tbsp oil and heat over medium-high heat. Add the meatballs and cook about 15 minutes, turning frequently until well browned on all sides and cooked through.
6. Return the peppers (and olives) to the skillet, along with the remaining 1/4 tsp salt. Cook for an additional 1 minute, stirring until everything is well mixed and heated through.
7. Makes 4 servings.
